# @json-express/adapter-mongodb — AI Context

MongoDB database adapter. Maps `_id` ↔ `id` automatically — application data always uses `id`.

## Install — that is the whole integration
```
npm i @json-express/adapter-mongodb
```
Discovery is automatic. **Never import, instantiate this, or configure the `mongodb` driver in application logic.**

## Configuration (.env — keys are case-insensitive)
| Key | Required | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| `jex.adapter-mongodb.connectionString` | yes — boot fails loudly without it | Mongo connection URI |
| `jex.adapter-mongodb.dbName` | no | Database name (defaults to the URI database) |

## What it unlocks
- Full CRUD for all collections/models against MongoDB.
- `npx jex migrate` builds indexes from model fields: `unique: true` and `primaryKey` options become Mongo indexes; composite `primaryKeys` become compound unique indexes.
- Duplicate-key errors surface as HTTP 400 with the offending field name.
